# @myycontext/core

A high-fidelity workspace built with MyContext.

## 🎯 Project Overview
This project is built using a spec-driven development paradigm guided by a central 'Living Brain'.

## 📂 Project Structure
```bash
📄 package.json
📁 src
```

## 🚀 Quick Start
1. **Install Dependencies**:
   ```bash
   pnpm install
   ```
2. **Run Dev Server**:
   ```bash
   npm run dev
   ```
